name: Z.AI
description: Registers Z.AI as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with selectable general API or Coding Plan endpoint auth.

env.description: Fallback Z.AI key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Z.AI API key or Coding Plan token
settings.description: Z.AI credential used for inference. Falls back to ZAI_API_KEY. Use a console API key with the General API endpoint, or a Coding Plan token with the Coding Plan endpoint.

settings.label: Z.AI endpoint
settings.description: Choose General API for long-lived Z.AI console API keys, or Coding Plan for tokens issued for the coding endpoint.

providers.name: Z.AI
providers.description: Registers Z.AI GLM chat/coding models through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport using the configured Z.AI endpoint.

providers.name: Z.AI Coding Plan
providers.description: Registers Z.AI models using the Coding Plan endpoint (https://api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4).
